components.name: Button
components.description: A button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling variants

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant of the button

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render as a child component using Radix UI Slot

components.name: Input
components.description: A flexible input field with comprehensive styling and forwardRef support

components.name: Card

props.description: Additional CSS classes for the card

components.name: Dialog
components.description: A modal dialog component built with Radix UI primitives, featuring overlay, content, header, footer, and close functionality

props.name: open
props.description: Controls dialog visibility (Radix UI Root prop)

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback when dialog open state changes

examples.title: Basic Dialog
examples.code:
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <button>Open Dialog</button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Are you sure?</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>
        This action cannot be undone.
      </DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

components.name: Select
components.description: A comprehensive dropdown select component built with Radix UI primitives, featuring scroll buttons, groups, and customizable styling

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value (Radix UI Root prop)

examples.title: Basic Select
examples.code:
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger>
    <SelectValue placeholder="Select an option" />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="option1">Option 1</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="option2">Option 2</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="option3">Option 3</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>

components.sourceCode:
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as SelectPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-select"
import { Check, ChevronDown, ChevronUp } from "lucide-react"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const Select = SelectPrimitive.Root
const SelectGroup = SelectPrimitive.Group
const SelectValue = SelectPrimitive.Value

const SelectTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Trigger>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Trigger>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.Trigger
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "flex h-9 w-full items-center justify-between whitespace-nowrap rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm ring-offset-background data-[placeholder]:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 [&>span]:line-clamp-1",
      className
    )}
    {...props}
  >
    {children}
    <SelectPrimitive.Icon asChild>
      <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 opacity-50" />
    </SelectPrimitive.Icon>
  </SelectPrimitive.Trigger>
))
SelectTrigger.displayName = SelectPrimitive.Trigger.displayName

export {
  Select,
  SelectGroup,
  SelectValue,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectContent,
  SelectLabel,
  SelectItem,
  SelectSeparator,
  SelectScrollUpButton,
  SelectScrollDownButton,
}

categories.name: forms
categories.description: Interactive form elements like buttons, inputs, and selects

categories.name: overlay
categories.description: Modals, dialogs, and other overlay elements
